species: we identify a gene (pgant9) that influences the structure and shape of secretory granules within the Drosophila salivary gland.
tissue: we identify a gene (pgant9) that influences the structure and shape of secretory granules within the Drosophila salivary gland.
sample_source: pgant9A was the predominant form in most tissues (including the trachea, midgut, hindgut, CNS and Malpighian tubules) with the exception of the salivary gland.
